Name: kool-kreds
Namespace: dev
Created: 2019-06-24
Modified: 2019-06-24

────────────────────────────────────────────────
 NAME         LOCAL SOURCE          SOURCE TYPE 
────────────────────────────────────────────────
 kool-config  /path/to/kool-config  path        
 kool-envvar  KOOL_ENV_VAR          env         
 kool-cmd     echo 'kool'           command     
 kool-val     kool                  value
